description: Create a CNC-ready 2D drawing of a cabinet side panel based on the specifications in '/home/ga/Documents/cabinet_spec.txt'. The drawing must include a 'PANEL' layer (White/7) for the panel outline and toe kick notch, a 'DADO' layer (Cyan/4) for the back groove, and a 'DRILLING' layer (Red/1) for the shelf pin hole array using System 32 parameters (32mm vertical spacing). Export the final drawing to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/side_panel_cnc.dxf'.
